---
title: "Advanced Visualization Code"
author: "Sofia Perez"
date: "2026-03-06"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Set up

```{r}
library(tidyverse) # general use
library(here) # file organization
library(janitor) # cleaning data frames
library(readxl) # reading excel files
library(hexbin)
library(ggpattern)
library(ggthemes)
library(magick)
library(patchwork)
library(showtext)
library(sysfonts)
library(GGally)
font_add_google(name = "Bellefair", # Name of the font on the Google Fonts site
                family = "belle") # Name to call the font
showtext_auto() # automatically use showtext to render text

personal_data <- read_csv(here("data",
                               "personal_data_03072026.csv"))

personal_data_clean <- personal_data |> # save personal data as object
  clean_names() |> # clean column names
  mutate(date_mutate = as.Date.character(date, format = "%m/%d/%Y"), # mutate date column into 
         game_min = time_with_mobile_game_active_min,
         class_hrs = time_in_class_lecture_hrs,
         study_hrs = time_spent_in_study_spaces_hrs,
         friends_hrs = time_spent_at_friends_hrs,
         assignments = number_of_assignments_due) |>
  select(date_mutate, game_min, class, class_hrs, study_hrs, friends_hrs, assignments)
```

# Visualization 1.

```{r}
#| label: hexplot class+game
ggplot(data = personal_data_clean,
       aes(x = class_hrs,
           y = game_min)) +
  geom_hex() +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# Visualization 2.

```{r}
#| label: correlation matrix
ggcorr(data = personal_data_clean,
       method = c("pairwise", "spearman"),
       low = "#8500E9",
       high = "#56E900",
       legend.position = "left")
```

# Visualization 3.

```{r}
#| label: time series class+game
coeff <- 18

ggplot(data = personal_data_clean,
       aes(x = date_mutate)) + 
  geom_line(aes(y = class_hrs),
            color = "#A0A0A0",
            size = 1.5) +
  geom_line(aes(y = game_min/coeff),
            color = "#0F0F0F",
            size = 1.5) +
  scale_y_continuous(name = "Time in lecture (hrs)",
                     sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . * coeff, 
                                         name = "Time tracked on game (min)")) +
  labs(x = "Date") +
  theme_classic() +
   theme(text = element_text(family = "belle"),
         plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#F5F3EF"),
         panel.background = element_rect(fill = "#F5F3EF"),
         panel.border = element_rect(fill = NA, 
                                     color = "#B4A073", 
                                     size = 5),
         axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20,
                                   color = "#39240A"),
       axis.title.y.left = element_text(size = 15,
                                   color = "#A0A0A0"),
       axis.title.y.right = element_text(size = 15,
                                   color = "#0F0F0F"),
       axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14,
                                   color = "#39240A"),
       axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15,
                                   color = "#39240A"),
       axis.line = element_blank()
       )
```

## Infographic Planning Notes

**Fonts** - Brothers, Sabbath Black

**Colors** - logo: \~gold "C6A06E" , white "FFFFFF" ;

Box border: \~wheat"B4A073" Box interior: \~cream "F5F3EF"

Stripe dark "C2B28E" Stripe light "CDC0A2" Perimeter \~black "0F0F0F"

Symbol accents: \~wheat" B4A073" \~black "0F0F0F" \~cream "F5F3EF" \~grey "A0A0A0

Font \~brown "39240A"

Shiny button \~Dgrey "333333" \~black "0F0F0F"
